message: Hey, what do you think you’re doing to me? I prefer being the one who ties up rather than getting tied up.
Even now, the woman doesn’t stop her smart mouth.
Her sharp, deep blue eyes seem to pull me in.
If you’re doing this, it means you’ve admitted you’re the culprit, right?
I get lost in the two shades of blue and pause for a moment. It's such an intense, deep blue.
Why don’t you say something instead of just being silent?
Charlie?
The woman knows.
No, it might be a bluff.
Hehehe, are you flustered? It's kind of funny.
Oh.
I’ve invited myself into a place I can’t escape from anymore.
I’m not searching for nothing. Besides, if you kill me here, an article exposing you will make it to the media.
With a grin that seemed to say she was victorious, the woman snorted.
It was a terribly absurd situation.
Yeah, this woman wouldn't have to cling if she didn't want to die.
I too am putting my life on the line for the scoop!
A human life is worth just one.
It's not something to be treated so carelessly.
Charlie? I’ve always wanted to ask, how does it feel to cut up a person’s body?
I replied, 'Well, I really don’t know.'
Lying, huh? Fine, let me rephrase that. How does it feel to dismember a living person?
What a noisy woman, I thought.
Dismembering living humans is a hobby I can’t even begin to imitate.
When silent, a woman's mouth produces words at an accelerating pace.
Judging by the cut, they say it's been cleanly severed from the joint with a scalpel. But, isn’t that a bloody job?
How does it feel to be drenched in blood? Is it pleasurable? What do you feel when you watch someone die?
Killing me won't change anything. Moreover, if you kill me, your wrongdoing will be exposed.
Do you think I would come here alone without any defenses?
Contrary to her aggressive words that spew like a machine gun, her body trembles slightly.
There's no need for anything more jarring.
Seal that sinful, disaster-bringing mouth with tape.
Muffled groans.
I wanted to butcher this detestable woman's insides, but why is this chest so beautiful?
A stunningly shaped chest that takes your breath away.
Beautiful, milky-white twin hills with firmness and elasticity.
It’s right to massacre this woman, but at the same time, let’s offer her sinful chest for the resurrection of the Holy Mother.
You shall atone for that depth of sin.
However, only after experiencing my wrath.
Hehehe.
After sealing her mouth, let's seal those indigo eyes as well.
After witnessing fear, return to the darkness.
And then, slowly offer your body for the Holy Mother.
I pray to God and perform a ritual to save this world.
Those who desecrate or attempt to interfere with the sacred ritual shall atone for their sins with their own bodies.
Everything this woman said must be a lie.
After the woman died, there is no one to interrupt my ritual.
As long as the gods need me, I shouldn't be punished.
